acquisition method: Orbitrap ExplorisTM 480 mass spectrometer was operated in data-independent and positive ionization mode.
cleavage agent: After cleavage with TEV protease, the reaction mixture was passed through the Ni-NTA resin again to remove the tag.
collision energy: the fragments were detected in the Orbitrap at a resolution of 30k with auto MaxIT.
fragmentation method: Peptides were then selected for tMS2 using HCD Collision energy at 30%.
instrument: analyzed on an EASY-nLC 1200 system coupled to Orbitrap ExplorisTM 480 mass spectrometer.
ionization type: Orbitrap ExplorisTM 480 mass spectrometer was operated in data-independent and positive ionization mode.
labeling: the samples were added with Lysis buffer (EasyPep™ Mini MS Sample Prep Kit, Thermo Scientific, USA) to extract the proteins.
